rulings.Case Title: KIM SZELOG VS. KYBA THAI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 01, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT CHAU VO Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment Hearing Required. Defendants counsel to explain the inconsistencies between the July 1, 2019 and July 29, 2019 proofs of service. The Court also notes that there is no declaration on file regarding providing notice of the continued hearing and that no courtesy copy of the July 29, 2019 proof of service was provided to the Court. This is the last chance for the defendant to establish that the motion was set on proper notice. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MARTHA R. MARTINEZ VS. GEORGE RAMIREZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 01, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT GEORGE RAMIREZ, WANDA MEZA-RAMIREZ, ESPERANZA MEZA DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states facts to assert a cause of action based on termination of license. Defendants' claimed tenancy is an issue of fact that cannot be addressed on a demurrer and may be raised by answer. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN JURY, AS ADMINISTRATOR FOR THE ESTATE OF VS. NATHAN JURY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 01, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT NATHAN JURY DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ANDINA PROPERTY LLC VS. LAURA FOX ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cognizance And Motion Wish For The Judicial Cognizance For The Ouster Of This Trust-Case
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 01, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT LAURA ELIZABETH Cognizance And Motion Wish For The Judicial Cognizance For The Ouster Of This Trust-Case DENIED, 5 days to respond. Defendants have been property served by posting and mailing pursuant to this Court's order. Moving party cites no authority for the proposition that posting and mailing have to be accomplished on the same date. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that return of the summons and complaint invalidates service. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ANDINA PROPERTY LLC VS. LAURA FOX ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cognizance Motion And Wish For The Judicial Cognizance For The Ouster Of This Trust-Case
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 01, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT LAURA ELIZABETH Cognizance Motion And Wish For The Judicial Cognizance For The Ouster Of This Trust-Case DENIED, 5 days to respond. Defendants have been property served by posting and mailing pursuant to this Court's order. Moving party cites no authority for the proposition that posting and mailing have to be accomplished on the same date. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that return of the summons and complaint invalidates service. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: YWCA APARTMENTS INC VS. JOHN ORISHYN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 01, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT JOHN ORISHYN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in clear and concise language whether language whether SFRO is applicable to this tenancy. If it is applicable, Plaintiff is to make all the required allegations of compliance, e.g. SFRO 37.9(c). = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: HERBERT LEW VS. KHATIA GOBEJISHVILI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Suppor To Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 01, 2019 line 6. PLAINTIFF HERBERT LEW Notice Of Motion and Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment is Granted on the condition that Defendant posts $1,700 with the Court no later than August 1, 2019 by 2:00 p.m. and files an answer thereafter no alter than 2:00 p.m. on August 1, 2019. = (501/CFH)
